channel.title: about on Light in the Iron Cage
channel.description: Recent content in about on Light in the Iron Cage

item.description: Welcome friend, stop and listen: *ome now, let us reason together, says the Lord: though your sins are like scarlet, they shall be as white as snow; though they are red like crimson, they shall become like wool. Isaiah 1:18 For God so loved the world, that he gave his only Son, that whoever believes in him should not perish but have eternal life. For God did not send his Son into the world to condemn the world, but in order that the world might be saved through him.
